metadata.title: Foreign Currency Debit Card | FCY | Card Banking | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: In our interconnected world today, we recognize the significance of banking that is seamless and convenient. That is why our Foreign Currency Debit Card provides unmatched global access to facilitate Pakistani exporters and freelancers holding an ESFCA account to perform swift financial transactions.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Meezan Foreign Currency (FCY) Debit Card for Exporters’ Special Foreign Currency Accounts (ESFCAs) In today’s interconnected world, we recognize the significance of seamless and convenient banking. That is why we are pleased to offer the Currency (FCY) Debit Card, which facilitates Pakistani exporters and freelancers holding an ESFCA account by providing unmatched global access to perform swift financial transactions. Freelancers and exporters can freely utilize Debit Card for making all types of current account payments abroad to meet their business needs, without prior approval from the SBP. These include but are not limited to the following: Payment for imports by exporters for the purpose of their own business. Payment for the acquisition of services/IT or digital services abroad by freelancers and IT exporters. Payments for dividends from domestic entities to their shareholders abroad, provided the shares owned are registered as 'Repatriable' with SBP. Operational expenses, including employee salaries, for liaison/marketing/representative offices abroad of local companies. Key Features & Benefits Worldwide Acceptance: The (FCY) Debit Card is powered by Mastercard and accepted at millions of outlets, online stores and ATMs worldwide*. *Cash withdrawals are restricted within Pakistan on Meezan FCY Debit Card. Spending Limits: (FCY) Debit Card meets your spending needs and provides access to your money with usage limits, including a daily limit of USD 5,000 for shopping and USD 500 for cash withdrawals. Enhanced Security: Debit Card is embedded with an EMV microchip, making it impossible for fraudsters to duplicate or clone your card. The card also features 3D Secure, adding an additional layer of security for e-commerce transactions. NFC Tap & Go: Debit Card is NFC (Near Field Communication) enabled, providing you the convenience of making contactless payments worldwide at retail outlets. *Fees, Charges & Transaction Limits To apply for Meezan FCY Debit Card, please visit your nearest branch. Issuance and Annual Charges FCY Debit Card As per SOC Card Replacement Charges (Lost, Stolen, Damaged) As per SOC Transactional Charges Cash Withdrawal (International) As per SOC International Purchase & Online Shopping As per SOC Transaction Limits (in USD) Transaction Type Single Transaction Limit Per Day Limit Cash Withdrawal (International) 500/- 500/- & Online Shopping (International & Domestic) 5,000/- 5,000/- *Note: The Bank may discontinue/suspend the FCY Debit Card services due to non-payment/non-recovery of associated charges. All charges are exclusive of applicable Government levies, including FED, provincial sales tax on services, and any other taxes. Conversion rate on international transactions will either be inter-bank rate or open market rate as per the prevailing regulatory instructions enforced. All international charges are settled in USD. FAQs Who can avail the Meezan FCY Debit Card? Meezan Bank customers having Special Foreign Currency Account (ESFCA) with the Bank can avail FCY Debit Card. This facility is exclusively available for freelancers and exporters. What transactions can be performed through my Debit Card? Meezan FCY Debit Cardholders can make all POS and e-commerce transactions abroad, along with ATM cash withdrawals. However, local ATM cash withdrawals are not permissible. How do I activate my Debit Card? Individual & Sole Proprietorship Account: To activate your debit card, call our 24/7 Call Centre at (+92 21) 111-331-331 or 111-331-332. The phone banking officer will activate your card upon successful verification. Entity Account (Partnership, Limited Companies / Corporations etc.): Within two working days, our Call Centre agent will contact the cardholder on the registered contact number provided in the issuance request and activate the card after successful verification, per the prevailing procedure. For how long is my card valid? The validity period of the card is five years from the date of issuance. The card expiry is mentioned on the front of the card. How do I change my ATM PIN? You can generate your ATM PIN by calling Call Centre at 111-331-331 or 111-331-332 (from outside Pakistan, call +92-21 111-331-331 or 111-331-332) and follow the directions through IVR (Interactive Voice Response). You may also change your ATM PIN any time by visiting the nearest Meezan Bank ATM. What should I do if my card gets stolen or lost? If you become aware that your debit card is lost or stolen, immediately at 111-331-331 or 111-331-332. From outside Pakistan, call +92-21-111-331-331 or +92-21-111-331-332 to report the loss or theft. You are protected from financial liability arising from any unauthorized transactions made on your card after it has been reported lost or stolen. Your old card will be cancelled, and a new card will be issued. Downloads Schedule of Charges Guidelines for ATM users Terms and Conditions MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum!
